chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1161 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of instant petition 06.8.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Dur Muhammad Shah, DAG -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 27.5.2022, which is over three years ago, learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of this petition. It was also noted that in case the petition is not argued by the counsel for the petitioner on the next date of hearing, appropriate order will be passed. Despite the lapse of three years, today, none present for the petitioner without intimation and the question of maintainability still remains unresolved. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. It also appears to be not maintainable as it is against the armed forces. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
